title: Palladium Extras
description: Extra Features for Palladium You All Want
body:
### 📚 Description
**Palladium Extras** is a quality-of-life and balance-focused addon for the Threetag Palladium Mod, designed only to add features that the community has been asking for in their survival worlds.


### 🚀 Features
**Titanium Ore Generation:** We've added a new Titanium Ore (with deepslate variant) so that you don't have to rely on finding those rare heart-shaped herb meteors just to get a little bit of Titanium for your crafts.


**Powers System Overhaul (WIP):** We're currently working on functionality to remove, and potentially store, your powers. Whether you're looking to do a full reset or just temporarily strip abilities, this feature aims to add flexibility so you don't have to worry about being stuck with every power under the sun. We hope to also make this compatible with other packs that may break when removing all powers.


**Config Settings (WIP):** We hope to make this entire project completely configurable for you guys, meaning if there's any settings you do or don't want you can tweak them to your liking!


### 🎯 Gameplay Changes
**More Immersive Progression:** With Titanium Ore spawning naturally, players can actually explore and mine for key resources, making it less necessary to focus on finding those pesky meteors and let's you focus on actually getting your powers.


**Customizable Playstyle:** The upcoming Power System Overhaul lets players fine-tune their experience, removing powers for whatever reason you'd like, and hopefully being able to store them for later use.

**This project is in active development, and new features will be added as the community provides feedback or demands something worth bringing together.**
